name: send_to_room
description: Send a message to a Blum room programmatically. NOTE: Your primary output contract requires XML message tags in your response text: <message to="name@room">text</message>. Use those first. Use this tool only for conditional sends, sends from within tool-execution logic, or when you need to send to multiple recipients dynamically. Using this tool does NOT replace the requirement to emit XML tags — if you use this tool but produce no XML output, your cycle will be flagged as silent.

recipient.description: Specific agent name (optional, omit for broadcast)
